CustomField.formula: IF( JU_C_InstractionService6__c=true,"ｆ", IF( OR(JU_C_ConsultingWork5__c=true, JU_M_NextOpportunity5__c=true && JU_O_DeactivateBudgetLimit5__c =true), "e", IF( OR(JU_C_SalesStaffConsult4__c=true, JU_M_NextAppointment4__c = true && OR(JU_O_SalesIntroduction4__c=true, JU_O_MailSubscribe4__c = true)), "ｄ", IF( OR(JU_C_SalesStaffConsult3__c=true, JU_M_NextAppointment3__c=true && OR(JU_O_ServiceDM3__c=true, JU_O_ThanksDM3__c=true, JU_O_WebAssess3__c=true, JU_O_ColumnOpen3__c = true,JU_O_WhitePaperDL3__c=true)), "ｃ", IF( OR(JU_C_SalesStaffConsult2__c =true, JU_M_BPOIntroduction2__c =true && OR(JU_O_MailDeliveryOK2__c =true, JU_O_TaskHearing2__c =true, JU_O_NextAppointment2__c=true)), "ｂ", IF(OR(JU_C_GetFirstInterview1__c=true , JU_M_GetContactAdress1__c=true && OR(JU_O_WhitePaperDL1__c = true, JU_O_SeminarParticipate1__c = true, JU_O_ExhibitionParticipate1__c =true)), "ａ", "ｚ" ))))))
CustomField.label: レベル_JU
